# Your Checklist for Unlocking the Power of AI

**How to Embed Agentic Intelligence into Every Layer of Marketing**

AI has evolved beyond automation. It’s now about intelligence that adapts, learns, and acts with purpose. Modern marketing teams are using agentic intelligence to connect strategy, data, and execution in real time, delivering relevance at every moment.

This checklist gives you the practical next step: how to apply that intelligence across your workflows, content, and culture to drive measurable business impact — not someday, but today.

## Introduction

AI isn’t just adding new features — it’s rewriting how marketing works. With agent-based automation and intelligent decisioning taking center stage, marketers finally have the tools to engage customers in real time, at scale, and with precision. Yet many teams remain stuck in outdated tactics and practices—manual, rigid, and increasingly disconnected from customer behavior.
